Bash(python -c "import sqlite3, json; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''backend/data/nettwin.db''\); row = conn.execute\(""SELECT payload FROM dry_runs WHERE id = ''777f7df1-8003-490b-a825-81ae5ad73f80''""\).fetchone\(\); data = json.loads\(row[0]\); ga = data.get\(''graph_after''\); gb = data.get\(''graph_before''\); print\(''S2 graph_before:'', ''present'' if gb else ''MISSING''\); print\(''S2 graph_after:'', ''present'' if ga else ''MISSING''\); print\(''S2 after nodes:'', len\(ga[''nodes'']\) if ga else 0, ''edges:'', len\(ga[''edges'']\) if ga else 0\); print\(''S2 dry_run_start:'', data.get\(''dry_run_start'', ''MISSING''\)\); print\(''S2 removed_node_ids:'', data[''impact''].get\(''removed_node_ids''\)\); print\(''S2 affected_node_ids:'', data[''impact''].get\(''affected_node_ids''\)\); conn.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3, json; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''backend/data/nettwin.db''\); row = conn.execute\(""SELECT payload FROM dry_runs WHERE id = ''8bf49448-a606-47f9-9a0d-eda937695838''""\).fetchone\(\); data = json.loads\(row[0]\); ga = data.get\(''graph_after''\); gb = data.get\(''graph_before''\); print\(''S1 graph_before:'', ''present'' if gb else ''MISSING''\); print\(''S1 graph_after:'', ''present'' if ga else ''MISSING''\); print\(''S1 after nodes:'', len\(ga[''nodes'']\) if ga else 0, ''edges:'', len\(ga[''edges'']\) if ga else 0\); print\(''S1 dry_run_start:'', data.get\(''dry_run_start'', ''MISSING''\)\); print\(''S1 removed_node_ids:'', data[''impact''].get\(''removed_node_ids''\)\); print\(''S1 affected_node_ids:'', data[''impact''].get\(''affected_node_ids''\)\); conn.close\(\)")
